_doc: ONNXim RKNPU2-approx config (Phase 1.3, engine='onnxim'). Generic systolic_ws NPU configured to approximate RKNPU2: 3 cores x 32x32 (borrowed Hexagon 32x32, the analytic NpuModel's dim), INT8 (precision=1 byte), core_freq 1000MHz -> 6144 GFLOPS = 6.14 TOPS ~= datasheet 6 TOPS; DRAM 25 GB/s (ramulator2 DDR4). icnt=simple (procedural). simulated, NOT silicon; ONNXim != issue #13. Copied from systolic_ws_8x8_c4, edited num_cores 4->3, core 8->32, precision 2->1, dropped icnt_config_path. SPAD scaled for 32x32 (spad 2048/accum 512/vector 8192 — the 8x8 default spad=64 is too small for a 32x32 array and causes a div-by-zero in Mapping.cc tiling). KNOWN ONNXim LIMIT: GEMMs with N<=64 still SIGFPE-crash (degenerate tiling) -> the cross-check uses N>=128.
